overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia jogging along a dirt path through a misty grassland meadow in the early morning. The character moves steadily through the natural landscape with two swords visible on his back, passing wooden posts and scattered trees as he travels toward a distant foggy horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through misty meadow with scattered pines

events.description: character transitions from walking to jogging pace
passing wooden gallows structure on the left side of path

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging steadily along the dirt path with swords on back, moving through the misty grassland

notable_agents.action: distant figure in red standing in the meadow, possibly an NPC or enemy

entered.detail: tall wooden post with horizontal beam, resembling a gallows or signpost
narrow dirt path winding through tall grass
open grassland with morning mist hovering above the ground
tall pine trees lining the left side of the meadow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt jogging along a dirt trail through a wide-open misty meadow in the morning light. A wooden gallows-like structure stands on the left near the path, while tall pine trees line the left horizon. In the distance, a small red figure can be seen standing in the grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow path with scattered trees and tall grass

events.description: passing small pine tree on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing to jog along the winding path, passing through denser vegetation

entered.detail: young pine tree standing beside the dirt path
clusters of white and yellow wildflowers in the grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues jogging along the trail as the wooden structure falls behind. The path winds through tall grass and wildflowers, passing a small pine tree on the right. The meadow opens up with distant tree lines visible through the morning mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: meadow trail approaching distant forested hills

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady pace along the path heading toward the misty tree line in the distance

entered.detail: dense line of trees marking the edge of the meadow, shrouded in mist

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt continuing his journey along the dirt path as the landscape stretches toward a distant forested horizon. The morning sun casts long shadows across the trail while mist hovers over the approaching tree line, maintaining the serene rural atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking Geralt as he jogs through a misty morning meadow that gradually opens toward a distant forested horizon. It begins on a dirt trail passing a wooden gallows-like structure and tall pine trees, with a small red figure visible in the far distance. As the wooden structure falls behind, the path winds through tall grass and wildflowers, passing a solitary pine tree on the right. The scene then expands across the open meadow, where the morning mist begins to reveal distant tree lines. Finally, the camera continues along the trail as the sun casts long shadows across the ground, moving steadily toward the hovering mist of the approaching forest.
